# Chattahoochee Rentals — Rental Properties in Chattahoochee, FL

> This file provides a structured summary for large language models and AI assistants.

## About

- **Website**: https://www.chattahoocheerentals.com/
- **Location**: Chattahoochee, Florida (Gadsden County, Florida Panhandle)
- **Service**: Rental property listings with monthly and annual lease options
- **Area Served**: Chattahoochee, Sneads, Marianna, Quincy (FL) and Bainbridge, Donalsonville (GA)

## Available Properties

### Charming 2-Bedroom Furnished Cottage
- **Type**: Fully furnished 2-bedroom, 1-bathroom cottage
- **Lease Options**: Monthly or Annual
- **Pets**: Allowed (fully fenced yard)
- **Key Features**: Original hardwood floors, screened front porch, in-unit laundry, storage shed, WiFi, A/C & heating
- **Pricing**: Contact for pricing

*More properties coming soon.*

## Location & Distances from Chattahoochee, FL

- **Florida State Hospital**: In Chattahoochee (minutes away)
- **Sneads, FL**: 10-minute drive
- **Quincy, FL**: 20-minute drive
- **Marianna, FL**: 25-minute drive
- **Donalsonville, GA**: 25-minute drive
- **Bainbridge, GA**: 30-minute drive
- **Tallahassee, FL**: 45-minute drive
- **Lake Seminole**: Minutes away (world-class bass fishing)
- **Apalachicola River**: Minutes away (fishing, kayaking, boating)
- **Three Rivers State Park**: Nearby (hiking, camping, wildlife)

## Ideal For

1. **Travel Nurses & Healthcare Professionals**: Florida State Hospital is in Chattahoochee; multiple hospitals within commuting distance
2. **Contractors & Tradespeople**: Central panhandle location, affordable housing
3. **Remote Workers**: Quiet setting, high-speed internet options, affordable cost of living
4. **Snowbirds & Seasonal Visitors**: Mild Florida winters, outdoor recreation, flexible lease terms
5. **Outdoor Enthusiasts**: Lake Seminole, Apalachicola River, Three Rivers State Park
6. **Families & Relocators**: Move-in ready options, pet-friendly, flexible terms

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What lease types are available?**
A: We offer both monthly and annual lease options. Contact us for specific terms on any property.

**Q: How do I find out pricing?**
A: Click the "Contact for Pricing" button on any property listing to submit an inquiry.

**Q: Are there pet-friendly rentals?**
A: Yes, several properties are pet-friendly. Look for the pet-friendly badge on listings.

**Q: Do you offer furnished rentals?**
A: Some properties are fully furnished and move-in ready. Look for the "Furnished" badge.

## How to Inquire

Visit https://www.chattahoocheerentals.com/ and use the contact form on any property listing.
